fragment.choose:
<when condition="@{
			var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "");
			return apiType.Equals("openai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		}">
			
				<dimension name="UAIG Model ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="UAIG API Type" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="User ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Subscription ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("subscription-name", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Backend ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Original Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Final Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", "N/A"))" />
			
		
		
		<when condition="@{
			var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "");
			return apiType.Equals("inference", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		}">
			
				<dimension name="UAIG Model ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="UAIG API Type" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="User ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Subscription ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("subscription-name", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Backend ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Original Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Final Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", "N/A"))" />
			
		
		
		<when condition="@{
			var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "");
			return apiType.Equals("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || 
			       apiType.Equals("responses-v1", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		}">
			
				<dimension name="UAIG Model ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="UAIG API Type" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="User ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Subscription ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("subscription-name", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Backend ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Original Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Final Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", "N/A"))" />
			
		
		
		<when condition="@{
			var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "");
			return apiType.Equals("geminiopenai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		}">
			
				<dimension name="UAIG Model ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="UAIG API Type" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="User ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Subscription ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("subscription-name", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Backend ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Original Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Final Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", "N/A"))" />
			
		
		
		
			
				<dimension name="UAIG Model ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="UAIG API Type" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "unknown"))" />
				<dimension name="User ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Subscription ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("subscription-name", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Backend ID" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Original Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "N/A"))" />
				<dimension name="Final Path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", "N/A"))" />
